title: Transitions
description: Movements between treatment levels, cross-cutting changes, and the work and tooling each requires.

kind.description: The kind of transition. level-to-level moves from one specific level to another. downward describes the bidirectional flow back to lower levels. cross-cutting describes changes that apply across all levels, such as accessibility or scope improvements.

from.description: Starting level or levels. Empty or omitted for cross-cutting transitions.

fromNotes.description: Free text for cases where the starting condition is not adequately captured by a level identifier list.

to.description: Ending level or levels. Empty or omitted for cross-cutting transitions.

toNotes.description: Free text for cases where the ending condition is not adequately captured by a level identifier list.

resourcesAffected.description: Resources most affected by this transition.

resourcesAffectedAllResources.description: Set to true if all resources are affected, rather than enumerating them.

workRequired.description: What practical work this transition involves.

toolsAndServicesInvolved.description: Tools and services that support this transition.
